{{zh-forms|ss=⿰氵早|alt=淉,𱧘,𱩍}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|水|喿|ls=psc|c1=s|c2=p|t1=water}}.

===Etymology===
Compare {{cog|lus|su}}, {{m|lus|sûk||to wash}}, though the vowel in these forms do not correspond well with the {{ncog|och|-}} form ({{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}).

===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# {{lb|zh|literary}} to [[wash]] one's [[hand]]s
# to [[bathe]]; to [[wash]]
#: {{zh-co|洗澡|to take a bath}}
#: {{zh-co|澡堂|bathhouse}}
